projectDescription: An annotation-processor based Android library that auto-generates a UI browser to organize, discover, search, and visualize Jetpack Compose components, colors, and typography.
keyFeatures: Auto-generated UI browser for Jetpack Compose components, colors, and typography
First-class support for @Preview annotation — existing previews work out of the box
5 auto-generated permutations per component: basic, dark mode, RTL, font scaled, display scaled
Multi-module support for aggregating UI elements across the entire project
Component style variants via styleName and defaultStyle properties
KDoc documentation displayed inline in the Showkase browser
Screenshot testing integration via Paparazzi and Shot
Metadata API (Showkase.getMetadata()) for custom browsers and static analysis
Incremental annotation processing for faster builds
Search support by component name or group
publicApiSurface: @ShowkaseComposable(name, group, styleName, widthDp, heightDp, skip, defaultStyle, tags, extraMetadata, screenshotCaptureConfig)
ShowkaseScreenshotTest.onScreenshot(id, name, group, styleName, tags, extraMetadata, screenshotType, screenshotBitmap)
